name_cn:
M22303 m22304【LOCKME EAST WEST 】
The new LockMe East West chain bag is full of 1990s metropolitan flair and is a wardrobe staple for both day and night occasions. Grainy calfskin shapes a simple structure, establishing an elegant foundation together with the smooth chain shoulder strap and LV Twist lock. It can hold a wallet or phone and other daily necessities.
Size: 23.5 x 14 x 6 cm
